headline: Is Illinois Tool Works Inc. (ITW) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ITW a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Illinois Tool Works Inc. on The Investor’s Compass’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ITW. Illinois Tool Works Inc.’s share was trading at $249.64 as of May 28th. ITW’s trailing and forward P/E were 23.24 and 21.55 respectively […]
